attributes.action: start drilling in the north sea for oil and gas again instead of importing it.
attributes.additional_details: if britain was to go to war we are too depandant on foreighn oil and gas imports we need to produce our own
attributes.background: reopen the north sea oil and gas fields and make the uk independant again from having to import oil and gas

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Make the most of our own natural resources. Allow companies to drill gas and oil
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/763065
